creator: marklmi26-fbsd@yahoo.com
text:
(In reply to Mark Millard from comment #8)

I should have noted that I'm still expecting that macOSX or linux
programs that might be generated and used during the buidworld
buildkernel sort of activity would use /usr/include/ materials in
their builds. I was only thinking of the build avoaiding /usr/include/
for programs/code intended for execution under FreeBSD.
